title: stipa rudis subsp. nervosa
intro: Stipa rudis subsp. nervosa, also known as rough wheat grass or nervous bent grass, is a type of grass native to certain regions. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Stipa rudis subsp. nervosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
